name: ASUS PRIME H770-PLUS D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5066(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Thunderbolt (USB4) Header
shortName: ASUS PRIME H770-PLUS D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support
description: ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR4, PCIe 5.0 support, and premium connectivity features including Thunderbolt.
